note: seq=6 (queue): META GUARDIAN - watcher-of-watchers. Fetch+sha-verify scripts/meta_guardian.py into /opt/atlas/guardian/, run its --selftest as a fail-loud gate, then install atlas-guardian.service + atlas-guardian.timer (every 3 min, RandomizedDelaySec, offset from the 2-min puller). This is the DIAGNOSE+AUTO-HEAL+ESCALATE layer ON TOP of the cc607d9d lanes: seq-4 atlas-backup (consumed via last_backup.json) and seq-5 atlas-health (consumed via /var/lib/atlas/health/last_health.json). Clean division: health lane owns fast raw alert-<ts>.json; guardian owns alert-guardian-<node>-<ts>.json + guardian-latest.json. NO conflicting timer. Guardian no-ops gracefully until workers/collectors/PG exist. PLACEHOLDER seq=6 -- this assumes backups=4 and health=5 land first; renumber to last_seq+1 if your real queue differs (only hard rules: unique, increasing, AFTER seq-3 so atlas.business exists for the puller's post-apply health gate).

steps.note: seq=6: fetch+verify+selftest meta_guardian.py, install atlas-guardian.service/.timer (3-min). Auto-heal: restart failed atlas-* worker/collector (rate-limited), kick stalled atlas-autopull.service (start-only), clear stuck enrich_queue claims. Escalate: PG down, schema drift, repeated source failures, throughput regression, queue runaway, stale/missing backups, dead fast-health probe, box-critical. NEVER stops/disables atlas-autopull, ssh, or firewall.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/guardian/meta_guardian.py':'ef41f2539548ff012491e75626ed491ab123ef7950c3560ace2800966e92f983'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Meta Guardian (diagnose + auto-heal + escalate; watcher-of-watchers)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service atlas-autopull.timer
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/guardian/meta_guardian.py --once
TimeoutStartSec=240
StandardOutput=append:/var/log/atlas/guardian.log
StandardError=append:/var/log/atlas/guardian.log

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS Meta Guardian every 3 min (offset from the 2-min auto-pull cadence)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=3min
OnUnitActiveSec=3min
RandomizedDelaySec=20
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-guardian.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
